title: Customer Complaint — Delayed Order
description: The learner must demonstrate how to handle an upset customer whose order arrived three days late.
situation: You are a customer service representative. A customer named Alex has just reached you on chat. Their message reads: 'My order was supposed to arrive three days ago — I needed it for an event this weekend and it never showed up. I already sent an email two days ago and nobody got back to me. This is completely unacceptable.'
constraints: Acknowledge the customer's frustration before moving to solutions
Offer a concrete next step — investigate the order, contact the carrier, or escalate
Do not make promises you cannot keep
Present a resolution option (replacement or refund) proactively

expert_answers.answer: Apologise sincerely and acknowledge the impact of the delay before anything else. Look up the order immediately and check its current status with the carrier. Keep the customer informed at each step, and proactively offer the choice of a full refund or a priority replacement before they have to ask. If the carrier cannot provide an update within 24 hours, escalate and follow up directly with the customer.
